Video.summary: Mike is ready to end his relationship with his girlfriend because of her jealous ways; Jared admits a secret; Barry hopes to prove to an exotic dancer that he is not a typical customer and wants a chance at love.
Video.title: Fooled by a Fake Friend

Video.summary: Audrina is prepared to get to the bottom of rumors that her boyfriend slept with her strip-club co-worker; Ashley's husband wants her permission to have sex with other women; Stephanie's revelation may ruin her bond with her newfound sister.
Video.title: Stripper Slapfest

Video.summary: RJ has to choose between the rockstar lifestyle or settling down with his girlfriend Elaina. Janyce learns her roommate Angel has been sharing her man David! Fed up with Stacy, Brandon lets her in on a little secret!
Video.title: I'm A Rockstar, Baby

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Jordan admits that he has not been faithful to his girlfriend; Shay confesses that she has shared a lot with her best friend; Trisha learns that her fiance slept with her friend again.
Video.title: Bitter BFFs

Video.summary: Latoia suspects that her male-stripper boyfriend, Hurricane, is gay; Savannah thinks Windy has caused a divide in her relationship with her boyfriend; Taylor wants her one-night stand with Cowboy to turn into a long-term relationship.
Video.title: Is My Stripper Boyfriend Gay?

Video.summary: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush; psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend; Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.
Video.title: Frenemies Attack!

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: Whitney learns what really happens during her children's father's late-night sessions at the recording studio; new mom Coralena is engaged in a war between her fiance and her friend; Denzel's girlfriends fight over him.
Video.title: Big Booty Mistakes

Video.summary: A scandal involves two cousins and their boyfriends; Hector wants to propose to his girlfriend, but must first come clean about something he did while he was on the road; Brittney wants to get romantic with a man who already has a girlfriend.
Video.title: The Fiesta Is Over

Video.summary: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.
Video.title: Naughty Girls

Video.summary: Tiffany wants to escalate things with her workout partner, but he has eyes for a woman who is hiding her true identity; Sammie says he offered a woman sex instead of money when he lost a bet to her; Brianna has feelings for her pool-playing buddy.
Video.title: Sexercise Me

Video.summary: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.
Video.title: Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Video.summary: Kenyatta confronts a suspected home-wrecker; Corey wants to reunite with his children and their mother; Ashley wants her baby daddy's wife to get out of the way.
Video.title: Cheaters out of Chances

Video.summary: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.
Video.title: I Live In A Box!

Video.summary: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.
Video.title: Bizarre Love Affairs

Video.summary: Paris began prostituting at 11 years old and has continued for the last 10 years. She says she didn't like living by her moms rules so she left home and turned to prostitution to make money and take care of herself. Special guest host, Steve Wilkos is here to help her turn her life around.
Video.title: Steve Help Me Stop Prostituting

Video.summary: Diamynn admits to hooking up with a man who has a girlfriend and a child; Angel regrets kissing Brittany and does not want to rekindle a relationship with her; Kaitlyn says her husband's floundering wrestling career is hard on their family.
Video.title: Baby, I'm Weak

Video.summary: Kiki taught Kat the ropes whens he started in the strip clubs and then they became lovers. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to join him in a threesome with his secret lover, Eric!
Video.title: Two-timers Confronted

Video.summary: Brandy admits to sleeping with her pregnant friend's boyfriend; Amanda fears that her fiance has eyes for another woman; Scott hopes he can sing his way back into his girlfriend's heart.
Video.title: Relationships Hit a Sour Note

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: Paige wants her man to commit; Monica suspects her daughter's boyfriend is cheating; Ashleigh wants two women to show off their hidden talents to win her love.
Video.title: Barely Legal Hook-Ups

Video.summary: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!
Video.title: I've Had Enough…It's Over!

Video.summary: Keisha's not only been disappointed with boyfriend Raymond's career choice selling DVD's on the street, but also his performance in bed. Then, not only did Desean cheat, he broke one of the sacred rules and slept with Dawntavia's best friend!
Video.title: Wild One Night Stands

Video.summary: David has been married to Linda for 3 years and has been living in his car for 2˝ of them! He claims that her children won't allow him in the house and in order to save his marriage, he camps out in his car parked next to their home.
Video.title: I Live In A Car!

Video.summary: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.
Video.title: First-Time Fantasies

Video.summary: After Mike became a dad, he felt trapped and bored from fatherhood and found Liz! Sherrie fights to win Don back from his gay lover Warren! Gloria’s matchmaking days are over as her best friend Andrea slept with her fiancé!
Video.title: I Need More Than You

Video.summary: Tanisha confronts her man and the dancer who hooked up with him; to try to get her boyfriend to marry her, Brandi has taken extraordinary measures to spice up their love life; Ashley needs to teach her coworker the importance of stripper etiquette.
Video.title: Strippers Shake It Up

Video.summary: Josh wants to win back his ex, but his cheating ways resurface; Deja confronts her boyfriend about his indecent proposal to twin strippers; Misti learns that her boyfriend is cheating again.
Video.title: Hillbilly Heartbreak

Video.summary: Chris is here today to tell his girlfriend, Chrissy, about his sexual fetish. Next we meet Mistress Tara, the dominatrix who caters to Chris' fantasy. We'll watch him pretend to be a dog.
Video.title: My Day As A Dog!
